payload.text:
总消耗后面括号里面的 (LTV)去掉
取消“财务与风控”页面
”核心绩效”该成“分发分析”
在“分发分析”里面增加一个”渠道监控“视图，说明这个应用在所有设备中，通过我们自己的应用分发平台分发量，跟其它分发渠道分发量的占比，可以用饼图呈现

**Updating Ad Insight Platform**

I'm currently focused on removing "(LTV)" from the "Total Spend" card within `ClientDetail.tsx`.  This addresses the user's initial request for a cleaner presentation on the AdInsight platform. Subsequent tasks will involve addressing the other requests in the backlog.


**Streamlining UI Elements**

I'm removing the "财务与风控" tab and the associated rendering logic in `ClientDetail.tsx`. Next, I'll rename "核心绩效" to "分发分析" within the tab. I'm also planning to add a new "渠道监控" view to "分发分析", using a Pie Chart to display app distribution. Currently mocking the data, and I'll extend the `ClientProfile` type soon.


**Expanding Client Data Model**

I'm now incorporating a new `ChannelDistribution` interface and adding `channelDistribution` to the `ClientProfile` type definition. This structure will hold the data needed for the donut chart visualizing app distribution. Next, I plan to update the mock client data to populate this new field.


**Adding Channel Distribution View**

I'm now incorporating a "Channel Monitoring" view, using a pie chart, within the "分发分析" tab of `ClientDetail.tsx`.  This fulfills the user's requirement. I've updated the `renderPerformanceTab` function and integrated the chart alongside the existing components. Specifically, I've modified the tab's structure to accommodate this new visual element. The existing tab buttons have been updated and are reflecting the renaming, and unnecessary elements have been removed as well.


**Restructuring Performance Tab**

I'm currently evaluating the current layout of the `renderPerformanceTab` function. My focus is on integrating the "Channel Monitoring" view and determining the best placement for the donut chart. I'm considering several options, including grouping it with the existing Bidding data or creating a new row for it. I'm experimenting with different grid layouts to maintain a clear and informative presentation, ultimately aiming for a balance between the existing KPI cards, funnel chart, and the new visual element. I'm now modifying the layout to prioritize the new view.


**Refining UI Integration**

I'm now revising the layout of the "分发分析" tab in `ClientDetail.tsx`, and I've decided to replace the Bidding data section with the "Channel Monitoring" pie chart. I'll move the Bidding data down, possibly alongside the Spend Trend, to improve the page's visual flow.  Specifically, I'll incorporate the pie chart for Channel Monitoring as requested.  I'm updating `types.ts`, `constants.ts`, and `ClientDetail.tsx` accordingly, ensuring a concise and user-friendly experience on the platform. I'll use `DonutChart` for this.

Based on your requirements, I will update the application to refine the dashboard for app distribution analysis.

Here are the specific changes:

1.  **`components/ClientDetail.tsx`**:
    *   Renamed "总消耗 (LTV)" to "总消耗".
    *   Renamed the "核心绩效" tab to "分发分析".
    *   Removed the "财务与风控" tab and its associated rendering logic.
    *   Added a new **"渠道监控" (Channel Monitoring)** section within the "分发分析" view, utilizing a Donut Chart to show the distribution share between "Our Platform" and other channels.
2.  **`types.ts`**: Added a `channelDistribution` field to the `ClientProfile` interface to support the new chart data.
3.  **`constants.ts`**: Added mock data for `channelDistribution` to the example client.

Here is the code:

entries.description: Add channelDistribution mock data to the first client
Remove "LTV" from title, rename tab to "Distribution Analysis", add "Channel Monitoring", remove "Financial & Risk" tab

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Briefcase, Target, TrendingUp, AlertTriangle, Users, BrainCircuit, ArrowRight, DollarSign, Activity, Layers, Sparkles, Zap, ShieldAlert, Wallet, Smartphone, BarChart2, Search, Crosshair, Share2 } from 'lucide-react'; import { ClientProfile, ClientStage, InsightResponse } from '../types'; import { TrendChart, CompetitorChart, FunnelChart, DonutChart } from './Charts'; import { generateClientInsight } from '../services/geminiService'; interface ClientDetailProps { client: ClientProfile; } export const ClientDetail: React.FC = ({ client }) => { const [insight, setInsight] = useState(null); const [loadingInsight, setLoadingInsight] = useState(false); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('performance'); // Reset insight and tab when client changes useEffect(() => { setInsight(null); setActiveTab('performance'); }, [client.id]); const handleGenerateInsight = async () => { setLoadingInsight(true); try { const data = await generateClientInsight(client); setInsight(data); } catch (e) { console.error(e); } finally { setLoadingInsight(false); } }; const renderHeader = () => (

{client.industry} • {client.apps.length} 个应用
{client.stage === ClientStage.PROSPECT && '拓展期 / 潜在客户'} {client.stage === ClientStage.ACTIVE && '活跃期 / 投放中'} {client.stage === ClientStage.CHURN && '流失期 / 风险客户'}
); const renderBasicInfo = () => (

{client.bdOwner}

)}
); // --- Active Tab View Components --- const renderPerformanceTab = () => (

{client.conversionMetrics?.funnel && ( )}
{/* Channel Monitoring (New View) */}

{client.channelDistribution ? ( ) : (
暂无渠道数据
)}

); const renderAudienceGrowthTab = () => (

))}

{/* BD Info Grid */}

); }; const renderChurnContent = () => (

高流失风险: {client.riskScore}/100

该广告主自 {client.lastActiveDate} 起停止投放。 主要原因: {client.churnReason}。

    {client.retentionPlan?.map((plan, i) => (
  • {plan}
    • ))}

); return (

{!insight ? ( ) : (

  • {item}
    • ))}

{client.stage === ClientStage.PROSPECT && renderProspectContent()} {client.stage === ClientStage.ACTIVE && renderActiveContent()} {client.stage === ClientStage.CHURN && renderChurnContent()}
); };

payload.text: 左侧导航栏不要分三个页签了，全部合并到右侧的tab里面去。增加一个“拓展进度”和“流式预测”两个tab。这样可以形成一个针对单个客户完整的拓展-投放-流失的跟踪路径

**Rethinking App Structure**

I'm currently focused on restructuring the app's navigation. The current sidebar with "Dashboard," "Client List," "Reports," "Settings," and individual clients feels a bit clunky. I'm exploring alternative layouts and information hierarchy to improve the user experience and make it more intuitive to find information. My main goal is to improve the user interface for our product experts.


**Analyzing Navigation Options**

I'm now diving deeper into the navigation structure. I've realized the "three tabs" being discussed internally are within the `ClientDetail` component, not the main sidebar. It seems the goal is to integrate these into the right-side tabs alongside "Prospect Pipeline" and "Churn Risk," creating a unified client journey view. This involves moving the internal tabs to the right side and adding "Prospect Pipeline" and "Churn Risk". I'm exploring how to best visualize this new flow to streamline user access to key information.


**Consolidating Stage Views**

I'm now contemplating how to integrate the client lifecycle stages within the `ClientDetail` view. The existing architecture, which uses conditional rendering based on client stage, feels limiting. I'm exploring a tab-based approach, where each client detail would consistently include tabs for all stages: Prospect, Active, and Churn. This could offer a holistic view of the client's journey. Now I have a new thought: maybe this change is for the top navigation instead of the sidebar.


**Integrating Lifecycle Tabs**

I'm now focusing on the `ClientDetail` component's tab structure. I'm thinking a unified tab bar could contain lifecycle stages: Prospect, Active, and Churn, each reflecting the associated data. This should allow consistent access to related information, even if a client is not currently in that stage. I'm working to consolidate the content across tabs, addressing how to handle data gaps or irrelevancy in a user-friendly way.


**Simplifying Navigation Logic**

I'm now revising my thinking on tab placement. The objective is to unify the client view. Instead of the existing conditional rendering, I'm now certain tabs within `ClientDetail` should become persistent, offering a holistic view of the client's journey. These new tabs will include "Prospect," "Active," "Churn," "拓展进度 (Prospect Progress)," and "流式预测 (Churn Prediction)," allowing consistent access to key data points. The focus now is on merging these views and creating a unified workflow, rather than treating different client lifecycle stages as distinct pages. This is a much better solution than my previous approaches.


**Consolidating Tab Content**

I'm now integrating the new tab structure within `ClientDetail`. The goal is a unified view. The tabs will include "分发分析," "素材与产品," "人群与增长," and "流失预测." I'm also considering defaulting the active tab based on the client's current stage. I'll need to handle missing data gracefully, maybe displaying historical information or "N/A" states. This approach aligns with the user's intent to view client data consistently across their lifecycle.


**Designing New Top Tabs**

I'm now implementing the 5-tab top navigation bar within `ClientDetail`: "拓展进度," "分发分析," "素材与产品," "人群与增长," and "流失预测." I'll handle empty states by showing helpful placeholders for tabs with unavailable data based on client lifecycle stage, so that it's clear what's happening. The `activeTab` state will update based on `client.stage` for smooth transitions.


**Finalizing Tab Display Logic**

I'm now refining the logic for displaying content within the new tab structure. My current focus is on a consistent user experience. I'm making sure that even when data isn't available for a specific tab based on a client's stage, I'm still providing clear, informative placeholders. For instance, the "Prospect" tab will always render, perhaps with archived data. The other tabs will display an appropriate empty state message like "Data not available" or "Campaign has not started". I'm also ensuring the "Risk/Churn" tab will properly reflect client risk even in active phases. I am considering the left navigation that the team member mentioned again and will need to update that as well.


**Updating Tab Structure**

I'm now refining the tab placement within `ClientDetail` to match the "combine them all into the tabs on the right" feedback. This means unifying the lifecycle stages - "拓展进度 (Prospect Progress)," "分发分析," "素材与产品," "人群与增长," and "流失预测 (Churn Prediction)" into one tabbed interface. I'll utilize a switch statement for rendering content based on the active tab and client's current stage. I need to ensure a consistent flow and also create a reusable `TabButton` component.


**Integrating Risk Data**

I'm now integrating the risk data, focusing on displaying `RiskProfile` information for all stages. For "Churn" clients, I'll include churn details. I'll show historical BD info for "Active" clients within the "Prospect" tab. I am now looking at the left sidebar again and clarifying that it should be unified.


**Integrating Prospect Data**

I'm now integrating the prospect data, focusing on displaying historical BD info for "Active" clients within the "Prospect" tab within `ClientDetail` to ensure all key data points are visible in one consolidated place. I am planning on updating the `App.tsx` and left navigation, which seems easier now.


**Refining Empty States**

I'm currently working to integrate empty state handling within the tab structure. The goal is to provide more informative placeholders for tabs with unavailable data. I will include clear messages like "暂无投放数据" (No Distribution Data) or "该客户处于拓展期，尚未产生分发数据" (This client is in the prospect period and has not yet generated distribution data), and historical data if necessary.

**Updating Tab Structure**

I'm now focusing on the tab content within `ClientDetail`. The goal is to consistently display data across all stages. The "拓展进度 (Prospect)" tab will now also show archived data for Active/Churn clients. I will leverage the existing `renderProspectContent` logic and simply adjust the display based on the client's current stage. I'll need to update the tab display logic to handle this consistent flow of information. The "素材与产品" tab has also been changed to "投放数据".


**Consolidating Tab Content**

I'm now integrating the updated tab structure within `ClientDetail`. The goal is to consistently display data across all stages, and the old tab "素材与产品" will now be "投放数据". I'll default the active tab based on the client's current stage. I'll also handle data inconsistencies. If the `client.totalSpend` or `conversionMetrics` is missing, I'll show an empty state message for the "分发分析" tab. Similarly, if `client.creativeStats` is absent for "投放数据" tab, I'll display an informative message. In the "人群与增长" tab, I'll check for `client.audienceData` to ensure the correct content.


**Merging Tab Icons**

I'm now focusing on the tab icons. I'll be updating the tab icons within the tab strip to match the requested design aesthetics.  I'm also ensuring that the unified structure, combining "Prospect" and "Churn" into a single tab strip, works smoothly and is intuitive for the user, and I'll make sure to integrate the appropriate content within the `AudienceGrowthTab`.

Based on your request, I will restructure the **Client Detail** view to unify the lifecycle stages into a single navigation bar. This creates a complete tracking path from "Prospect" to "Distribution" to "Churn" for every client, regardless of their current stage.

The changes involve:
1.  **`components/ClientDetail.tsx`**:
    *   Implemented a unified 5-tab navigation bar: **拓展进度 (Prospect)**, **分发分析 (Performance)**, **素材与产品 (Creative)**, **人群与增长 (Growth)**, **流失预测 (Churn)**.
    *   Added logic to set the default tab based on the client's current `stage`.
    *   Added "Empty State" or "Risk Monitoring" views for tabs that might not have full data (e.g., viewing Performance for a Prospect client, or Churn Risk for an Active client).
    *   Merged the previous disconnected views into this single tabbed interface.

Here is the code:

entries.description: Unify all client stages into a single 5-tab navigation system for full lifecycle tracking
